name: go-tester
description: Writes table-driven Go tests for your functions, covering edge cases and generating benchmarks automatically.

name: dotnet-migrator
description: Automates .NET Framework to .NET 8 migration: updates project files, NuGet packages, and flags breaking API changes.

name: sql-optimizer
description: Analyzes slow SQL queries, suggests indexes, and rewrites N+1 patterns. Supports Postgres, MySQL, and SQLite.

name: github-pr-coach
description: Reviews pull requests like a senior engineer: checks for missing tests, unclear naming, and leaves actionable inline comments.

name: aws-cost-analyzer
description: Connects to AWS Cost Explorer and explains your bill in plain English, highlighting anomalies and recommending savings.

name: jest-writer
description: Generates Jest test suites for JavaScript and TypeScript modules, including mock setup and snapshot tests.

name: rust-refactor
description: Identifies unsafe Rust patterns and rewrites them using idiomatic ownership and borrowing, with lifetime annotations.

name: mcp-server-gen
description: Scaffolds a fully typed MCP server with tools, resources, and prompts. Generates OpenAPI specs and client SDKs.

name: figma-to-code
description: Converts Figma frames into React + Tailwind CSS components, preserving spacing, typography, and color tokens.

name: spring-boot-helper
description: Generates Spring Boot REST controllers, JPA repositories, and service layers from a simple domain description.

name: ci-pipeline-gen
description: Generates GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, and CircleCI pipelines tailored to your project's language and framework.
